---
title: "Probing structural transformations and degradation mechanisms by direct observation in SIFSIX-3-Ni for direct air capture"
date: "2024-03-01"
author: 
  - M. L. Barsoum
  - J. Hofmann
  - H. Xie
  - Z. Chen
  - S. M. Vornholt
  - R. Dos Reis
image: "../../images/SIFSIX_TOC.jpeg"
---

Barsoum, M. L.; Hofmann, J.; Xie, H.; Chen, Z.; Vornholt, S. M.; Dos Reis, R. Probing structural transformations and degradation mechanisms by direct observation in SIFSIX-3-Ni for direct air capture. *J. Am. Chem. Soc.* **2024**, *146* (10), 6557–6565. [https://doi.org/10.1021/jacs.3c13145](https://doi.org/10.1021/jacs.3c13145)
